framework.name: A2A Identity = AgentCard + Standard Web Auth
framework.description: A2A does NOT use DIDs, verifiable credentials, or novel crypto primitives for identity. Identity verification is via AgentCard (a JSON metadata document describing identity, capabilities, endpoint, and authentication requirements) plus standard web security practices. Authentication is delegated to existing enterprise patterns, not reinvented.
framework.raw_quote: Security: Facilitate secure communication patterns suitable for enterprise environments, relying on standard web security practices.
